violations.text: Double stack oven doors in prep area were not closing all the way. Fan from top oven does not turn off when doors are opened. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

-The kitchen hood lights at pizza station were nonfunctional during time of inspection. -One light bulb under main kitchen hood light was nonfunctional during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The floors in the warewashing room and mop room were observed in poor repair (peeling paint and sealant and/or rust). The physical facilities to be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2026
The kitchen hood vents were observed misaligned; when system is on vents are being pulled into hood by air system. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Service faucet in mop room was observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025

Nonfunctional commercial mixer and industrial fan were observed in the kitchen area. Establishment shall be kept free of unnecessary and/ or nonfunctional equipment to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
Kitchen hoods were observed with an accumulation of dust. Physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
Gasket for walk-in freezer observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025

The door to the outside (door #6) is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2025

Bottom pipe at dishmachine observed leaking when machine in use. Water observed splashing onto electrical box when machine in use. Dishmachine was taken out of service by PIC during time of inspection. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

Nonfunctional commercial mixer and industrial fan were observed in the kitchen area. Establishment shall be kept free of unnecessary and/ or nonfunctional equipment to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
Kitchen hoods were observed with an accumulation of dust. Physical facilities to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
The doors to doors #2 and #5 were not tight fitting. Doors to be properly adjusted to prevent entryways for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. top oven (work order in place) 2. dumpster lid (missing) 3. pipe connected to dishmachine (observed leaking) 4. light bulb at sandwich hot unit. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024

Nonfunctional commercial mixer and industrial fan were observed in the kitchen area. Establishment shall be kept free of unnecessary and/ or nonfunctional equipment to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Dishwasher was not in good repair and is not currently functioning. 3-bay sink is to be used to wash, rinse, and sanitize until dishwasher is serviced and functioning properly. Service order has been placed and is expected this week. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
Leak observed under the rinse bay of the 3-bay sink. Drip observed at the single prep sink. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area (commercial mixer). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The sneeze guard in the pizza hot holding unit shall be extended (longer in length) to protect foods. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The 2 hot wells, 2 main oven doors, and bulb in the walk-in cooler were not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the hood/vent have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (Hobart mixer) or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The doors to the outside, located in the front entrance and back kitchen entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

The 2 hot wells, 2 main ovens, and bulb in the pizza hot holding unit located in the kitchen area were not in good repair. -The 2 hot wells were not operating at the time of this inspection. -The 2 main ovens are not consistently maintaining temperature and bottom oven door is not tight fitting. -Bulb in the pizza hot holding unit observed with coating peeled off. -Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Any unused equipment shall be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
